title: Alternative Paths - Else and Elif
description: Handle multiple possibilities with else and elif - master complete decision trees.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: The 'else' clause runs when the if condition is False. It's the 'otherwise' action.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So if/else gives me two paths? One for True, one for False?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Create an if statement, then add an else clause below it. Either the if block or the else block runs, never both!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Now my code handles both scenarios!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! If/else ensures one path is always taken.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: What if you have more than two options? Use 'elif' (else-if) to check additional conditions!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Yes! Start with if, add elif clauses for other conditions, and finish with else for any remaining cases. Python checks each in order!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Elif lets me have multiple conditions checked in order!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Exactly! Python checks each condition in order and runs the first True one.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's apply this! Use if/elif/else to decide which plot to plant in based on conditions!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So different conditions lead to planting in different plots?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Your farm can be smart and adaptive!

objectives.description: Use if/elif/else to decide which plot to plant in

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: My code adapts its behavior based on conditions!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: This is the beginning of true artificial intelligence in farming!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Final challenge! Create a smart farming system using if/elif/else chains to manage your crops.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Your goal: harvest 5 wheat crops using your conditional logic! Plant them, let them grow, then harvest. Show me your mastery!

objectives.description: Harvest 5 wheat crops to complete the quest
Use if/elif/else to manage your farming decisions

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: My code makes intelligent farming decisions!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Outstanding! Now you understand branching logic. Ready to apply these skills to more complex scenarios?
